---
title: "attirtiontrat4"
output: html_document
date: "2025-05-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(staffattrition)
```


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
staffattrition$OverTime <- as.factor(staffattrition$OverTime)
staffattrition$MaritalStatus <- as.factor(staffattrition$MaritalStatus)
staffattrition$Attrition <- as.factor(staffattrition$Attrition)
staffattrition$JobSatisfaction <- as.factor(staffattrition$JobSatisfaction)
```


```{r}
fit.lm <- glm(data = staffattrition, formula = Attrition ~ MonthlyIncome + JobSatisfaction, family = "binomial")
summary(fit.lm)
```
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr) 
library(kableExtra) 
library(pROC) 
library(caret) 
library(sampling) 
library(plotrix)
st.pred <- staffattrition %>% mutate(attrition.actual = Attrition,
                                     default.prob = round(fit.lm$fitted.values,4),
                                     default.pred = ifelse(default.prob > 0.1, "Pred.Yes", "Pred.No")
                                      )
nrow(st.pred[st.pred$Attrition == "Yes" & st.pred$default.pred == "Pred.Yes", ])

actual <- as.factor(st.pred$attrition.actual) %>% relevel(ref = "Yes") 
predicted <- as.factor(st.pred$default.pred) %>% relevel(ref = "Pred.Yes")

confmat <- table(actual, predicted) %>% addmargins() 
confmat
```
```{r}
213/237
```

```{r}
pred <- data.frame(MonthlyIncome = 5000, JobSatisfaction = "Very_High")
predicted_log_at <- predict(fit.lm, newdata = pred, type = "response")
predicted_log_at
```
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(tinytex)
library(car)
library(pROC)
library(e1071)
library(StatMatch)
library(randomForest)
library(ranger)
library(xgboost)
library(ada)
library(kernlab)
library(caret)
library(gbm)
library(readxl)
library(glmnet)
library(VGAM)
library(Metrics)
library(janitor)
library(broom)
library(stats)
library(tidyverse) 
library(broom)
library(skimr)
library(tinytex)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(tableone)
library(AppliedPredictiveModeling) 
library(vip)
```
